api.description: Optimized for DeepSeek's OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint and current V4 models.
api.currentDefaultDescription: Preview what chats will use after this profile is saved.
api.profileDescription: Save one or more DeepSeek keys and switch the active profile used by chats.
api.connectionDetailsDescription: Fill the key, confirm the endpoint, and choose the default model for chat requests.
api.modelDescription: Choose the model for chat generation.
api.legacyWarning: Legacy alias — switch to deepseek-v4-flash or deepseek-v4-pro before July 24, 2026.

deepseek-v4-flash.label: DeepSeek V4 Flash
deepseek-v4-flash.description: Default choice for responsive chats and roleplay.

deepseek-v4-pro.label: DeepSeek V4 Pro
deepseek-v4-pro.description: Use for heavier reasoning, coding, and complex writing.

api.savedDescription: Custom model ID from saved profile.
api.generationDescription: DeepSeek V4 supports long context and optional reasoning depth.
api.temperatureHint: Controls output randomness. 0 = deterministic, 1 = maximum creativity. Recommended 0.7-1.0 for roleplay.
api.maxTokensHint: Maximum tokens to generate per response. Leave blank or 0 for model default.
api.streamingHint: When enabled, AI responses appear word-by-word. When disabled, the full response appears at once.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose your color scheme. Changes apply instantly and are saved for restart.
appearance.lanEnable: Allow other devices on your local network to access NeoTavern via browser.
appearance.lanRestartHint: Restart the app after changing these settings.
appearance.lanPasswordHint: Other devices on your LAN will need this password to connect.
appearance.lanPasswordNote: Password is randomly generated on first launch and persists across restarts.

general.title: General
general.debugHint: Save every round's full prompt as a JSON file under the app data debug_prompts folder.
general.debugDetail: Each chat creates a subfolder named after the character and chat ID. Files include round, trigger, and message ID.
general.dailyCostHint: Warn when today's DeepSeek spend reaches 80% of the daily limit.
general.autoUpdateHint: Automatically check and download updates on startup. Visit the About page to install.
general.autoUpdateToggleHint: New versions will be downloaded silently in the background

image.title: Image Generation
image.description: Generate images via ComfyUI for your chats. Manual trigger only.
image.comfyUrlHint: Must be reachable from the app at runtime.
image.workflowHint: Must include a 'KSampler' node to inject prompts.
image.plannerConfigHint: Used to analyze AI replies and find scenes suitable for image generation.
image.worldbookRefHint: Provides matched worldbook entries as style reference for image planning.

context.title: Context Tokens
context.description: Max token budget for chat history. Messages are trimmed from oldest to newest until the budget is met. Set to 0 for unlimited.
context.tokenEstimate: Token estimation uses ~4 chars per token. Actual token count depends on the model's tokenizer.

contentMode.title: Content Mode
contentMode.description: Choose the local generation policy. This state is persisted and is the single source of truth for generation.
contentMode.normalDesc: No strict safety interception and no built-in NSFW writing item. Best for most everyday roleplay.
contentMode.healthyDesc: Injects the safety prompt, blocks explicit input/output, and filters the NSFW writing item.
contentMode.adultLimitedDesc: Enables the built-in gentle NSFW writing item without Healthy Mode's hard interception.
contentMode.adultLimitedActive: Limited NSFW is enabled: chats use the built-in gentle NSFW writing item, while still following platform and model-provider rules.

healthyMode.title: Healthy Mode
healthyMode.description: Enable content safety guardrails. Automatically intercepts explicit content. Mutually exclusive with NSFW preset.
healthyMode.enableHint: Injects a safety prompt and detects explicit content.

features.title: Active protections
features.prompt: Safety prompt: guides AI to avoid R18 content
features.explicit: Explicit detection: terminates output when blatant sexual content is detected
features.nsfw: NSFW preset filtering: the built-in NSFW writing item is not sent during generation

conflict.title: Healthy Mode conflicts with NSFW
conflict.description: The NSFW writing preset is currently enabled, which is mutually exclusive with Healthy Mode. Disable NSFW and enable Healthy Mode?

regex.title: Regex Rules
regex.selectOrCreate: Select a preset or create one

deletePreset.title: Delete Regex Preset
deletePreset.description: Delete "{{name}}" and all its rules? This cannot be undone.

websearch.title: Web Search
websearch.description: Search engine used by Neo Builder for character creation. Changes take effect immediately.
websearch.help: Tavily requires an API key. Sign up at tavily.com for free credits. Falls back to built-in search if no key is provided.
websearch.tavilyKeyHint: Get your key at tavily.com. Leave empty to fall back to built-in search.
